src/main/java/com/edu/controle/certifica.general_idea: Changed the primary key from Long (auto-increment) to UUID to support distributed or non-sequential identifiers.
Changed the repository's generic type parameter from Long to UUID to align with the entity's primary key type.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.2.5 to 3.3.5 to support Java 21 and access newer features.
